positive: Minimalist abstract constellation pattern, depicting a vibrant, stylized nebula and interconnected geometric stars in deep midnight blue and electric cyan. The composition must be highly symmetrical, forming a clean, continuous border design suitable for t-shirt printing. The primary element is a single, recognizable celestial arc (like the Big Dipper) rendered in glowing gold foil effect. Use strong negative space contrast and sharp, defined edges. Stylized vector illustration, dotwork engraving aesthetic mixed with digital glow. Flat lay, clean print design. Perfect for fabric printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logos, copyrighted characters, bad anatomy, low detail, messy, disorganized, gradient fade, photo, realism
